slide1.title: Welcome to Lokihub
slide1.subtitle: A powerful, all-in-one Flokicoin Lightning wallet powering the next web of engagement.

slide2.title: Always Ready
slide2.description: Your wallet is online and ready to use on any device, anytime.

slide3.title: Secure & Private
slide3.description: Encrypted by your password. Only you can access your funds.

slide4.title: Connect Apps
slide4.description: Link up with apps and join the Web of Fun.

welcome.title: Welcome to Lokihub
welcome.subtitle: A powerful, all-in-one Flokicoin Lightning wallet powering the next web of engagement.

start.title: Start
start.description: Enter your password to unlock and start Lokihub.
start.starting: Starting Lokihub may take a few minutes.

unlock.title: Login
unlock.description: Enter your unlock password to continue

password.title: Create Password
password.description: Your password is used to access your wallet, and it can't be reset or recovered if you lose it.
password.label: Password
password.securedConfirm: I've secured this password in a safe place
password.irrecoverableConfirm: I understand this password cannot be recovered
password.notConfirmed: Please confirm you have saved your password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

finish.connectionTimeout: Connection timed out. Please check your node.

security.title: Security & Recovery
security.description: Take your time to understand how to secure and recover your funds on Lokihub.
security.confirmed: I understand how to secure and recover funds

restore.title: Import Wallet from Migration File
restore.description: Upload your encrypted wallet migration file.
restore.restartingDesc: Lokihub needs to restart to finish restoring your node
restore.restartingMessage: If you're running in the cloud, your Lokihub will restart automatically. Otherwise, please manually restart your Lokihub to finish the restore process.
restore.warning1: As part of the node restore process your Lokihub will be shut down.
restore.warning2: If you're running in the cloud, your Lokihub will restart automatically. Otherwise, please manually restart your Loki Hub to finish the restore process.

complete.title: All done!
complete.description: Your node is ready to use.

services.title: Hub Configuration
services.description: Configure external services for your node.
services.fetchError: Failed to fetch Hub Configuration. Please check your connection.
services.communityNote: These service suggestions are provided by the community. To suggest changes or add new services, please submit a pull request to the <1>lokihub-services</1> repository.
services.warningText: You are responsible for the services you connect to. Ensure you trust the providers of these URLs.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.description: You've made changes to your services configuration that haven't been saved. If you leave now, these changes will be lost.

explorer.title: Flokicoin Explorer
explorer.description: Used for fee estimation and transaction details.

relayGroup.title: Nostr Relays
relayGroup.description: Each purpose below keeps its own independent relay list — changing one doesn't affect the others.

relay.title: Nostr Relays
relay.description: Used for Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC) communication. Multiple relays improve availability.

generalRelay.title: General Relays
generalRelay.description: Used to fetch Nostr profiles, notes, and events — including Circle followers and contact lists (kind:0/kind:1/kind:3).

searchRelay.title: Search Relays
searchRelay.description: Used only for NIP-50 search queries.

lsp.title: Lightning Service Providers
lsp.description: Manage LSPs for JIT channels and inbound liquidity.
lsp.name: Name
lsp.pubkeyExists: LSP with this Pubkey already exists

swap.title: Swap Service
swap.description: Enables Lightning to on-chain swaps (and vice-versa).

messageboard.title: Messageboard
messageboard.description: Connects to a NWC-enabled messageboard service.

validation.relayRequired: At least one relay is required
validation.swapRequired: Swap Service URL is required when enabled
validation.messageboardRequired: Messageboard URL is required when enabled
